name: Replicard LAD
name_jp: レプリカルド・ラッド
desc: You can banish 1 other Level 7 or higher monster from your hand; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 face-up monster you control; Special Summon 1 monster from your Deck with a different name that has 2 or more of the same Level, ATK, and/or DEF, but it cannot activate its effects this turn. You can only use each effect of "Replicard LAD" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can banish 1 other Level 7 or higher monster from your hand; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 face-up monster you control; Special Summon 1 monster from your Deck with a different name that has 2 or more of the same Level, ATK, and/or DEF, but it cannot activate its effects this turn. You can only use each effect of "Replicard LAD" once per turn.
eff: You can banish 1 other Level 7 or higher monster from your hand; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 face-up monster you control; Special Summon 1 monster from your Deck with a different name that has 2 or more of the same Level, ATK, and/or DEF, but it cannot activate its effects this turn. You can only use each effect of "Replicard LAD" once per turn.

mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
